coding_projects.donwload_description: You can visit our GitHub page to see the full source code of this app.

project1.title: GradeBook
project1.description: GradeBook is an Android application that I developed to help students and teachers manage their grades and assignments. The app allows users to create and organize their courses, track their progress, and calculate their final grades based on different grading schemes.

project2.title: TeamPyros Mobile App
project2.description: An Android application designed to monitor and interact with the autonomous fire prevention system developed by TeamPyros.

body.monitoring: The TeamPyros Mobile App allows users to monitor in real time the data generated by the autonomous vehicle and its sensor network. Through the app it is possible to view information such as the remaining amount of water or other extinguishing agents, battery status, environmental temperature, and critical events including toxic or flammable gas leaks and fire detection. The application also maintains a record of all detected events, allowing users to review the system's activity over time.
body.emergency: To improve safety in critical situations, the app integrates an automatic emergency alert system. When a serious threat is detected, the system starts a 60-second timer after which it automatically calls the configured emergency numbers, ensuring that help can be requested even if the user is unable to react in time.
body.technology: The application connects to cloud services through Firebase in order to receive and synchronize data from the autonomous vehicle in real time. Its interface was designed following Material Design 3 and Material You guidelines, incorporating the Monet dynamic color system that adapts the app’s palette to the device’s wallpaper to provide a modern and intuitive user experience.
